External macro is risk-off (Brent +8% to ~$120 on Trump Iran-port blockade, FII -₹2,468 Cr on Apr 29, USD/INR record-low 94.85, Big Tech overnight tape pending). Composite tilt: LOW — internal cleanliness dominates a moderate macro headwind.

findings: DEPLOYMENT IS CHRONICALLY LIGHT: 44.79% deployed (49.61% on full-fill of GLENMARK) sits 15.39 pp below the 0.65 cap, the lightest carrying cash position of the experiment so far. Per the prompt's explicit 'Idle capital is a real cost in an active-trader experiment, not a virtue' framing, this is a real cost. However, the under-deployment is SIGNAL-GATED (strategy not finding entries) not PARAMETER-GATED (no admission rejected on capacity in 7 sessions) — the deployment cap is not the binding constraint, so loosening it would not directly increase deployment.

SECTOR PROFILE IS MATERIALLY CLEANER THAN THE OVERRIDE STACK ASSUMES: largest sector BFSI 12.93% sits 9.07 pp under the prior 22% cap. Originating threats fully resolved — AUBANK exited Apr-27 (-₹866), MAHABANK exited Apr-28 (-₹3,516), TORNTPOWER+NTPC exited Apr-28→29. The 4-name Power cluster from Day-1 is gone (POWERGRID alone at 4.83%). The 22% cap was set on Day-6 12:00 to grandfather-bind against then-active 22.48% BFSI breach; that breach has been gone for 4 sessions.

POSITION-SIZING DISTRIBUTION IS HEALTHY: largest holding NESTLEIND 12.06% (3 pp under cap), smallest COALINDIA 4.71%. Mean position ~6.4%, no sub-3% sub-scale positions suggesting hedge-against-self behavior. The 15% cap is not biting; positions cluster in the 4-12% band naturally.

GLENMARK STALE-ORDER OBSERVATION: BUY 20 @ ₹2400 LIMIT submitted 2026-04-29 09:10:58 sat through Day-7 close without filling and rolls into Day-8 open. Will age past 24h at 09:10:58 (≈10 min after market open today). Order has SL set 4.4% wide — already a max_sl_pct cap breach (warning, not block). Strategy layer owes an explicit cancel-or-carry decision; risk_monitor logs ageing only.

PREMARKET MACRO IS RISK-OFF: Brent +8.13% to ~$120 on Trump Iran-port blockade overnight; USD/INR record-low 94.85; FII -₹2,468 Cr on Apr 29 (DII +₹2,262 Cr partial offset). Big Tech overnight tape (GOOGL/MSFT/AMZN/META post-bell) drives sentiment for IT services exposure (we have NONE — INFY/TCS/HCLTECH not in book). Heavy earnings calendar today (HINDUNILVR, ADANIPORTS, ADANIENT, BAJAJFINSV, ~47 reporters total) makes theme-trade admission likely if signal materializes.

DAY-7 BEHAVIORAL HEALTH: 2 disciplined CLOSEs (HINDZINC +₹172, NTPC -₹275, net -₹103.25), 1 disciplined add (BANDHANBNK 5% sizing 0.68 confidence), 4 correct guardrail blocks at 0.60-0.62 confidence floor. Asymmetric loss-aversion pattern that drove Day-6 panic exits did not recur. Override stack is functioning as a perimeter, not a binder.

MIN_CONFIDENCE OVERRIDE PERFORMING AS DESIGNED: 4 yesterday-blocked attempts at 0.60-0.62 — by the prompt's explicit criterion ('high-confidence (≥0.70) entries being blocked') the 0.65 floor is NOT eating top-tier signal. Closed-trade n=10 winners spread 0.65-0.75, losers spread 0.65-0.72 — no statistical gradient, no inference for floor adjustment yet. Hold per Day-10 milestone plan.

GLENMARK SL-BAND BREACH: 4.4% > 4% override admitted via engine warning-not-block on Apr-29. The strategy review (04-29 EOD) added system_prompt rule 5 hardening to plug the breach mechanism at the prompt layer. Loosening the SL-band overrides today would directly compound this risk vector — staying tight.
actions_taken: LOOSENED max_sector_pct from 0.22 to 0.28 (one-step revert toward base 0.35). Originating BFSI grandfathered-breach trigger fully resolved (BFSI 12.93% sits 9.07 pp below the prior cap). Today's portfolio does NOT resemble the Day-6 12:00 portfolio that justified the 0.22 setting (which was BFSI 22.48% + 4-name Power cluster + 6-BUY/90-min cadence). Step calibrated +6 pp to 0.28 (not full revert to base): retains 7 pp of discipline below base, respects strategy agent's stated Day-10 holistic review milestone. Bite mechanics: cap remains non-binding (BFSI 9.07 pp → 15.07 pp buffer); creates room for theme-driven entries on today's heavy earnings calendar (HINDUNILVR FMCG bellwether, Adani-complex Infra/Power/Energy reporters) without forcing the prior cap to bite on legitimate diversification. Non-punitive: no current or in-flight position invalidated. REVOCABLE: re-armed tighten triggers will fire 0.28 → 0.22 immediately on (a) 2nd Pharma admission pushing Pharma > 14% full-fill or (b) any 4-name sector cluster emergence.
actions_considered_but_not_taken: LOOSEN max_deployed_pct (0.65 → 0.70): NOT taken. Cap is non-binding (44.79% deployed / 49.61% full-fill) so loosening does not directly help deployment — under-deployment is signal-gated not parameter-gated. Premarket macro is risk-off; loosening volume-of-admission into a risk-off open has worse asymmetry than loosening sector diversification (the action chosen). Re-evaluate at 11:00 if intraday signal-frequency picks up and capacity-binding starts approaching.

LOOSEN min_confidence (0.65 → 0.60): NOT taken. By the prompt's criterion 'high-confidence (≥0.70) entries being blocked', the floor is NOT eating top-tier signal — yesterday's 4 blocks were all 0.60-0.62. Closed-trade n=10 lacks statistical gradient (winners 0.65-0.75, losers 0.65-0.72) so neither tightening nor loosening is data-supported. Hold per Day-10 milestone plan.

LOOSEN max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.18): NOT taken. NESTLEIND 12.06% largest holds 3 pp buffer; cap is not binding. Loosening with no firing trigger and no current position approaching the cap is theatrical and would slightly weaken the AUBANK/MAHABANK-blueprint defense that originally motivated the override. Hold.

LOOSEN SL-band overrides (default_sl_pct 0.015 → 0.02, min_sl_pct 0.01 → 0.005, max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.05): NOT taken. The GLENMARK 4.4% admission on Apr-29 is a fresh blueprint of the exact breach pattern these caps defend against (engine emits warning-not-block, so the prose-layer constraint is the only enforcement). Loosening today would compound the GLENMARK precedent into a normalized pattern. Strategy review (04-29 EOD) recommended PROMOTING max_sl_pct to a hard BLOCK at engine level — that is the right direction; loosening would be the wrong direction.

TIGHTEN daily_loss_limit_pct (base 0.075 → override 0.04 or 0.03): NOT taken. No trades today (premarket); buffer to circuit breaker is 75x current P&L (₹74,662 vs ₹0). Pre-fire trigger (Day-8 mark-to-market loss > -₹15K within 30 min of open) is dormant until market opens. Will re-evaluate at 09:30 tick if overnight gap-down materializes.

TIGHTEN max_sl_pct (0.04 → 0.035): NOT taken. Pre-armed trigger requires Day-8 admission of a ≥4% SL entry within first hour. Dormant until 10:00 tick. GLENMARK is a carry-over not a fresh breach; do not double-count.

PROMOTE current overrides to base config.yaml: NOT taken (out of scope for risk_monitor — strategy agent's responsibility). Strategy review (04-29 EOD) explicitly defers to Day-10 milestone (~2026-05-04). Today's loosening of max_sector_pct sets a slightly less aggressive base for that promotion to act on — compatible with the milestone plan.

REVOCATION TRIGGER (deeper): max_sector_pct 0.28 → 0.20 fires on (a) any 5-name sector cluster, or (b) any sector full-fill > 22% (would imply a grandfathered breach situation echoing the Day-6 BFSI pattern that originally justified the 0.22 setting).

max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.70 LOOSEN: pre-armed for the 11:00 tick if (a) at least 2 high-confidence (≥0.70) entries are admitted before 11:00 AND (b) capacity-binding is approaching (full-fill > 60%). Currently dormant — premarket signal not yet observable.

GLENMARK age-out escalation: at 09:30 tick, GLENMARK ages 24h+. Risk_monitor escalates to BEHAVIORAL FLAG if order is still OPEN (no fill, no cancel decision) at 10:00 tick — strategy layer owes an explicit disposition.

Composite distress meta-trigger D (HIGH risk_level): re-arms if (i) book P&L < -0.5% intraday AND (ii) any single-name in book < -3% AND (iii) strategy silent ≥ 60 min after market open. All three legs currently dormant.
rationale: Day-8 09:00 premarket tick. Internal portfolio risk is LOW (well-diversified, no concentration breach, healthy position-management cadence Days 6-7). External macro is ELEVATED but well-bracketed by the existing override stack (deployment cap, SL-band caps, confidence floor all hold). The override stack was built Days 1-3 against a panicky stacking book; over Days 6-7 the strategy layer has cleanly resolved the originating concentration triggers (AUBANK / MAHABANK / TORNTPOWER / Power cluster all exited). Today's portfolio is structurally cleaner than the override stack assumes, and the prompt's explicit guidance — 'Treat overrides as time-bounded — if today's portfolio no longer resembles the one that justified the override, prefer to revert' — applies cleanly to max_sector_pct: the BFSI 22.48% grandfathered breach the 0.22 cap was set against has been gone for 4 sessions. One precise loosening of max_sector_pct from 0.22 to 0.28 (still firmly tighter than base 0.35) is the most defensible single action: it lifts the constraint that has no current source while retaining 7 pp of discipline below base, and is fully revocable by re-armed tighten triggers. All other overrides held: deployed cap is non-binding (loosening doesn't help under-deployment which is signal-gated), confidence floor is not eating top-tier signal (no ≥0.70 blocks), SL-band caps are defending against an active breach pattern (GLENMARK 4.4%), position cap is non-binding. Strategy agent's Day-10 milestone plan to holistically promote/refine the stack remains intact and is in fact better-served by today's loosening (sets a slightly less aggressive starting point for the holistic review).
